Title: Authorizes early renewal of vehicle registration for members of the armed forces who will be engaged in the performance of their official military duties upon its expiration
Summary: Authorizes early renewal of vehicle registration for members of the armed forces who will be engaged in the performance of their official military duties upon its expiration.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the vehicle and traffic law, in relation to authorizing early renewal of vehicle registration for members of the armed forces who will be engaged in the performance of their official military duties upon its expiration
